title: Hana's Cards
description: Adds new collectable cards to Minecraft!
body:
# New October Updates! - Expansion One - Adds new variants - New Card Grading system - Expansion Two - Halloween Variants - New Rarity ## Adds New Collectable Cards to the game! Kill mobs to acquire card packs, and open them to get multiple cards. Series Pack One has dozens of cards to be collected! Specific Pack types give specific cards of different types, such as specific items, blocks, mobs, entities, and others. Specific Packs will try to stay within the scope of an overall theme for that pack. ### Current Aquireable Packs - Series One Card Pack - can drop any v1.0.0 mob card (That's 172 different cards) - Series One Expansion One pack - adds 181 new cards(only 46 if you exclude the extra collar colors) - drops various metallic, and mineral passive animal cards - drops any kind of tamed wolf card - drops the legendary flying pig card - drops some new axolotl cards - Series One Expansion Two pack - adds 26 new cards in total - drops pillager/illager cards - drops special Halloween-themed cards - drops wither, invulnerable wither cards - drops wildfire card - drops creaking and sleeping creaking cards - Overworld Mob Card Pack - drops exclusively overworld mob cards - Nether Mob Card Pack - drops exclusively nether mob cards - End Mob Card Pack - drops exclusively end mob cards ### Creative Only - Rainbow Card Pack - drops card of any rarity from any series

### Modpacks - Please credit
